name: @everycal/wordpress
description: WordPress plugin with Gutenberg block for displaying EveryCal event feeds

scripts.lint: pnpm run lint:js && pnpm run lint:php
scripts.lint:php:strict: sh -c 'command -v composer >/dev/null 2>&1 || { echo "Composer is required. Install Composer and rerun lint:php:strict."; exit 1; }; composer run lint --no-interaction'
scripts.php:setup: sh -c 'command -v composer >/dev/null 2>&1 || { echo "Composer is required. Install Composer and rerun php:setup."; exit 1; }; composer install --no-interaction'
scripts.i18n:compile: for f in languages/*.po; do msgfmt -o "${f%.po}.mo" "$f"; done
